title: Putting the laptop to sleep
drDigitalIntro:
Most of the time, put your laptop to sleep instead of turning it off.
• Just close the lid when you're done.
• It's ready instantly the next time you open it.
drDigitalSuccess: Nicely done! Closing the lid is the easiest way to put your laptop to sleep.
drDigitalHint: Watch the video, then click Continue whenever you're ready.
